# Fisher Plot

**Summary**: A graphical method used to determine the number of cycles in a sequence based on their thickness distribution.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-abdalla|Abdalla, 2013]] used Fischer Plots to define 44 cycles within the Arab-D succession.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The Fischer plot showed similarity in stacking patterns but differences in total cycle numbers compared to subsurface data. ([[2013-abdalla|Abdalla, 2013, p. 86]])
